name: silk
explanation: The Silk check builds a base URL `<host_address>/api/v2/` and issues authenticated HTTPS GETs to the Silk Cloud Data Platform REST API (`/system/state`, `/system/servers`, etc.). The spec only marks `host_address` as `required: true`, but the upstream Silk SDP REST API gates every endpoint behind the user's Silk credentials supplied via the standard HTTP `username`/`password` template, and the integration's documented setup requires a dedicated read-only Silk user. No unauthenticated path exists, so a wire probe cannot bring up the integration.
notes: Vendor REST API + per-tenant credentials (pattern D).
